_comment: Two entries: the upload-key fingerprint (used by sideload APKs from nettrash.me/play/scan/scan-latest.apk) and the Play App Signing fingerprint (used by Play installs). Both must validate against this list for autoVerify to flip an installed app from 'browsable' to 'verified' for https://nettrash.me/scan/* links. Pull the Play App Signing SHA-256 from Play Console → Setup → App integrity → App signing key certificate and substitute it below before deploying.
